summary: Good‑quality recording with standout percussion, though little detail on the rest of the show
review: The reviewer gives the tape a solid four stars and highlights the “fantastic percusion,” suggesting the drums come through clearly. No specific comments are made about the overall mix or song performance, so the recording is judged as generally good but without detailed verification.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer notes clear percussion (“sounds of symbls”) indicating good drum capture; no other technical details provided.
